asr_es: Acuerdo, no se trata de ningún virus nuevo, se trata simplemente de que como vamos a hacer una prueba, no podemos hacer la prueba con los nombres de los candidatos reales, que son los que están cargados en el sistema, de lo contrario, estaríamos quizá anticipando el resultado. Vamos a descargar los nombres de los candidatos reales y vamos a colocar nombres, por ejemplo, que les parece de músicos o pintores o alguna cosa que no tenga nada que ver con lo que aquí nos ocupa, de manera que el voto sea realmente un proceso de training.
hypothesis_en: Okay, this isn't some new virus, it's just that because we're going to do a test, we can't do the test with the names of the real candidates, which are the ones that are loaded into the system, otherwise, we'd probably be anticipating the result. We're going to download the names of the real candidates and we're going to put names, for example, that sound like musicians or painters or something that has nothing to do with what we're dealing with here, so that voting is really a training process.
reference_en: no we haven't got a new bug but we're going to have a test (1.48) ~a_nd we can't do the test with the real candidates names (1.05) which are loaded into the system because that would be if you like anticipating the the ~r_result so we're going to delete the real candidates names and we're going to put in some names of famous painters or artists or musicians or something like that names that you know have nothing to do with what we're dealing with this afternoon so that ((x)) a proper training exercise for you
